name: refinery-html-to-llm-cleaner
title: HTML to Text Cleaner for RAG and AI Agents
description: Extract clean text from HTML in 2-8ms. Removes JavaScript, CSS, and tracking tags automatically. Reduces LLM token costs by 40%. Perfect for RAG pipelines, web scrapers, and AI agents that need reliable data preprocessing.
seoTitle: HTML to Text Cleaner for RAG and AI Agents
seoDescription: HTML to text extraction tool for RAG pipelines and AI agents. Strip JavaScript and CSS from web pages instantly. Clean HTML for LLM training data. 14-56x faster than BeautifulSoup. Text preprocessing, data cleaning, and LLM-ready content API.
